must_have_quals: Proven Experience: Track record of deploying LLM-powered agents in production environments, with a focus on scalability and real-world impact, Enterprise Passion: Enthusiasm for solving complex challenges in enterprise settings through agent-based solutions, Cross-Industry Collaborator: Thrive in collaborative environments, bringing diverse perspectives and knowledge from varied industries to drive innovation, Technical Versatility: Comfortable operating at the intersection of software engineering and machine learning, bridging technical and business needs, Analytical Foundation: Background in analytics, NLP, or related fields, Experience Level: 0–5 years of professional experience, with a growth mindset and eagerness to shape the future of AI-driven agents
core_responsibilities: Prompt Optimization: Review, refine, and iterate on prompts for Cohere’s Command model to enhance performance across diverse customer agents and use cases, Tool Development & Evaluation: Collaborate with clients to refine custom tools and conduct rigorous evaluations to ensure alignment with their objectives, Core Agent Development: Contribute to defining and shaping core agents for out-of-the-box (OOTB) deployment on Cohere’s North platform, driving innovation in agent capabilities, Customer-Centric Solutions: Deeply understand customer business needs, then design and build tailored agents that deliver measurable improvements to their operations, Metric-Driven Collaboration: Partner directly with customers to define and track key metrics. Quality, efficiency, and accuracy— ensuring agents meet and exceed their goals
job_summary: Cohere is a company dedicated to scaling intelligence for humanity by training and deploying frontier models for AI systems. The Forward Deployed Engineer, Prompt Specialist will bridge the company's North platform with enterprise engineering teams to deliver scalable AI solutions, focusing on prompt optimization and customer-centric agent development.
